title: 2026 Q1 OKR - Engineering Department
content:
Department: Engineering
Head: Zhang Lei

O1: Improve product stability
  KR1: System availability reaches 99.95% (Q1 actual: 99.92%)
  KR2: P0-level incidents <= 2 per quarter (Q1 actual: 3)
  KR3: Mean time to recovery <= 30 minutes (Q1 actual: 25 minutes)

O2: Accelerate feature delivery
  KR1: Complete 12 feature releases (Q1 actual: 10)
  KR2: Feature delivery cycle <= 15 days (Q1 actual: 18 days)
  KR3: Code review coverage >= 90% (Q1 actual: 95%)
author: zhang.lei

title: 2026 Q1 OKR - Marketing Department
content:
Department: Marketing
Head: Liu Na

O1: Enhance brand influence
  KR1: Media impressions reach 5 million (Q1 actual: 6.2 million)
  KR2: Host 3 industry events (Q1 actual: 3)
  KR3: Social media follower growth of 20% (Q1 actual: 25%)

O2: Drive customer acquisition growth
  KR1: New registered users reach 8,000 (Q1 actual: 6,500)
  KR2: Customer acquisition cost <= 150 CNY/person (Q1 actual: 180 CNY/person)
  KR3: Lead conversion rate >= 15% (Q1 actual: 12%)
author: liu.na

title: 2026 Q1 OKR - Sales Department
content:
Department: Sales
Head: Wang Qiang

O1: Achieve Q1 sales targets
  KR1: Q1 revenue reaches 12 million CNY (Q1 actual: 13.5 million CNY)
  KR2: New signed clients >= 25 (Q1 actual: 28)
  KR3: Client renewal rate >= 85% (Q1 actual: 88%)

O2: Optimize sales process
  KR1: Average deal cycle <= 45 days (Q1 actual: 42 days)
  KR2: CRM data completeness >= 95% (Q1 actual: 91%)
  KR3: Monthly client visits per rep >= 20 (Q1 actual: 22)
author: wang.qiang
